{{Quote|If you ever get on Vleen's bad side, you're as good as dead.|[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="SL2" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Gresia Vleen''' was in command of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] the ''[[Tory's Catcher]]'' and patrolled the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]]. She had long [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], which she wore in a tight bun. She had an athletic body of such proportions that many [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|males]] could not keep their eyes off her.

Vleen appeared cool, calm, and patient, but was in reality extremely short-tempered. She was known to shoot freighter captains at point blank for mouthing off and to blast [[Starship/Legends|ships]] out of the sky for not following procedure. She would personally inspect every crate of cargo, and would also have [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] technicians investigate maintenance ducts and engineering spaces. She was accompanied by several [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], whom she always ordered to secure the ship to be inspected before inspection.

She was eager to prove her worth as an Imperial captain and was extremely meticulous. She expected full cooperation from inspectees. Freighter captains ogling her good looks would sometimes find themselves looking at the wrong end of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] barrel.

At some point before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Vleen captured smugglers [[Thi Sawrtin]] and [[Zayl Braith]], who were performing a "routine" smuggling run through the Noonian sector. Sawrtin tried to bribe Vleen; in reply she shot Sawrtin. Then she impounded Sawrtin's ship and convicted Braith to serve sentence on [[Rol Two|Rol II]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
